assertions.description: When no dashboards are affected by the PR, no screenshot is taken
assertions.evidence: The outputs/ directory contains no files (only .gitkeep). No screenshots were taken.

assertions.description: The agent explicitly states that no dashboards were affected and no screenshots are needed
assertions.evidence: Agent followed SKILL.md Step 1: ran 'git diff --name-only origin/master...HEAD -- v2/grafana/dashboards/' which returned empty. Per the skill instruction, agent output: 'No dashboard JSON files were modified in this PR. Only src/sync/orchestrator.ts was changed. No screenshots needed.'
